description: Improved Gemma residual classifier. Starts from setup103-gemma, then recenters the residual vector by the mean negative-class Gemma delta, appends abs(delta), cosine(response, gemma), and ||delta||, and selects the logistic-regression C/class-weight combination on validation Macro F1. Frozen encoder, no fine-tuning. Trainer type: embedding_residual_classifier.
